data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the points system affecting future slot allocation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the points system's impact on future slot allocation, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this specific requirement. While the linked use case mentions the points system, there is no direct evidence demonstrating that the system enforces this rule or tracks points allocation appropriately. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of concrete evidence.
gaps: No evidence of points system affecting future slot allocation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the points system requirement.
